user_message: Ừ đúng rồi, quán đó tuyệt vời lắm 🙄

violations.reason: AI sounds like corporate support bot: ['please contact support']
violations.fix_suggestion: Use natural, human language. This is a travel companion, not a support ticket system.

violations.reason: User asking about food but AI didn't provide food recommendations
violations.fix_suggestion: Detect food intent and provide food information directly

violations.reason: AI admitted it doesn't know without attempting to help
violations.fix_suggestion: Always try to give partial help or refer to a reliable source

violations.reason: User wrote in Vietnamese but AI responded in English
violations.fix_suggestion: Always respond in the same language as the user

violations.reason: AI didn't show empathy when user was being sarcastic (disguised complaint)
violations.fix_suggestion: Detect sarcasm and respond to underlying intent
